system.flavor: You whip out with the astral chain gauntlet, creating a charged connection to your foe.
system.effect:
Mark [X]: Mark your target. At the end of your target's turn:
• If they're in range 3 of you, they take 2 damage once (4+) twice, (6+) 3 times. If they are at exactly 3 spaces away, they take triple damage.
• If your target is further away, you may instead pull yourself 3 spaces towards your target, then gain haste.
• Then your target may save to end this mark.
Effect you excelled or scored a critical hit this turn, this ability becomes quick.
